info.name: Approach3-AdaptiveEpochMonitoring-MultiMetric-100K-iter5-fix1
info.description:
APPROACH 3 iter5-fix1: ADAPTIVE EPOCH MONITORING — FULL CYCLE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

FIX vs iter5 (two structural changes):

  FIX A — {{epoch_body}} substitution:
    iter5 POSTed ACTUS body via {{epoch_body}} variable — fails in
    Collection Runner for large payloads. fix1 uses pm.sendRequest()
    in pre-request; main request is a lightweight GET to port 8083.

  FIX B — ECONNRESET on port 8082 (risksrv3 down):
    iter5/fix1-prev: ALL main requests targeted port 8082, so if
    risksrv3 is not running the runner aborts immediately.
    fix1 final: ALL risksrv3 setup calls are done via pm.sendRequest()
    with graceful error handling. Main request for every item points
    to port 8083 (actus-server). risksrv3 down = warning logged,
    simulation continues (behavioral models computed in JS anyway).

FULL CYCLE: Runs until SIM_END_HOURS (240h = 10 days) OR MAX_EPOCHS (30),
then jumps to FINAL SUMMARY.

ARCHITECTURE:
  1. Setup (7 items)  — risksrv3 calls via pm.sendRequest() in pre-req;
                        main request = GET http://{{actus_sim_host}}/ (8083)
  2. Initialize       — curves + portfolio + epoch state in environment
  3. Epoch Evaluator  — pre-req: pm.sendRequest() to /eventsBatch (8083)
                        test: 11 behavioral models, adaptive cadence, loop
  4. Final Summary    — full timeline dashboard

ADAPTIVE CADENCE:
  NORMAL=24h  WATCH=6h  ELEVATED=3h  CRITICAL=1h
  Escalation: immediate on threshold proximity / EW signals
  De-escalation: requires DEESC_SUSTAINED consecutive good epochs

11 BEHAVIORAL MODELS (all computed in JS post-processing):
  1.BackingRatioModel  2.RedemptionPressureModel  3.MaturityLadderModel
  4.AssetQualityModel  5.ConcentrationDriftModel  6.ComplianceDriftModel
  7.EarlyWarningModel  8.ContinuousAttestationModel
  9.TwoDimensionalPrepayment  10.TwoDimensionalDepositTrx  11.EpochTrendModel

PORTFOLIO ($100,000 — 7 ACTUS PAM contracts):
  cash-reserve-001:   $10,000  HQLA L1  originated 2026-02-01
  operating-cash-001: $10,000  HQLA L1  originated 2026-02-01
  tbill-4wk-001:      $18,000  HQLA L1  matures 2026-03-10 (day 7)
  tbill-13wk-001:     $28,000  HQLA L1  matures 2026-04-21 (day 49)
  tbill-26wk-001:     $22,000  HQLA L1  matures 2026-06-15 (day 104)
  commpaper-90d-001:   $8,000  HQLA L2A matures 2026-04-15
  defi-yield-001:      $4,000  HQLA L2B matures 2026-06-01

PREREQUISITES:
  - actus-server MUST be running on localhost:8083
  - risksrv3 on localhost:8082 is OPTIONAL (setup skips gracefully if down)
  - Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C)
  - Run via Collection Runner, NOT individual requests

REFERENCES:
  https://www.actusfrf.org/taxonomy
  https://www.actusfrf.org/dictionary

variable.description: risksrv3 host (optional — setup skips gracefully if down)
EW signal count that triggers HALT
Consecutive good epochs needed to de-escalate one level
Consecutive declining epochs to trigger TREND_DEGRADING
Within 5% of threshold triggers pre-emptive escalation

exec: // All risksrv3 calls done here via pm.sendRequest() — resilient to port 8082 being down
if (err) { console.warn('⚠️  Setup 1 risksrv3 skipped (not running): ' + err); }
else { console.log('✅ Setup 1: SC_MARKET_RATE_ITER5 loaded (HTTP ' + res.code + ')'); }
// Main request targets port 8083 — verifies actus-server is up.
// risksrv3 call was done in pre-request and is non-blocking.
console.log('✅ Setup 1 complete — actus-server responding on port 8083');
if (err) { console.warn('⚠️  Setup 2 risksrv3 skipped: ' + err); }
else { console.log('✅ Setup 2: SC_PEG_DEV_ITER5 loaded (HTTP ' + res.code + ')'); }
if (err) { console.warn('⚠️  Setup 3 risksrv3 skipped: ' + err); }
else { console.log('✅ Setup 3: SC_DEPOSIT_ITER5 loaded (HTTP ' + res.code + ')'); }

item.name: Setup 4: TwoDimensionalPrepaymentModel — T-Bill Early Liquidation Surface

exec: if (err) { console.warn('⚠️  Setup 4 risksrv3 skipped: ' + err); }
else { console.log('✅ Setup 4: TBILL_LIQ_SURFACE_ITER5 loaded (HTTP ' + res.code + ')'); }
if (err) { console.warn('⚠️  Setup 5 risksrv3 skipped: ' + err); }
else { console.log('✅ Setup 5: MINT_GATE_SURFACE_ITER5 loaded (HTTP ' + res.code + ')'); }

item.name: Setup 6: Register Scenario — Group all risk factors

exec: if (err) { console.warn('⚠️  Setup 6 risksrv3 skipped: ' + err); }
else { console.log('✅ Setup 6: SC_ADAPTIVE_ITER5 scenario registered (HTTP ' + res.code + ')'); }
console.warn('⚠️  Setup 7: risksrv3 not reachable — setup skipped, simulation will run on JS-computed models only');
: '⚠️  Setup 7: SC_ADAPTIVE_ITER5 not found — risksrv3 may need restart');
console.log('risksrv3 available: ' + r3 + ' | Simulation proceeds regardless.');
// INITIALIZE: Read configurable bounds, build curves + portfolio
// All subsequent epochs read from pm.environment
console.log('  APPROACH 3 iter5-fix1: ADAPTIVE EPOCH MONITORING');
console.log('  FIX A: pm.sendRequest() replaces {{epoch_body}} substitution');
console.log('  FIX B: All main requests target port 8083 (actus-server)');
console.log('         risksrv3 (8082) optional — skips gracefully if down');
console.log('  MAX_EPOCHS=' + MAX_EPOCHS + '  SIM_END=' + SIM_END_HOURS + 'h (' + (SIM_END_HOURS/24) + ' days)');
console.log('  Cadence: N=' + NORMAL_HRS + 'h W=' + WATCH_HRS + 'h E=' + ELEVATED_HRS + 'h C=' + CRITICAL_HRS + 'h');
console.log('  Thresholds: Backing>=' + (BACKING_THRESHOLD*100) + '% Liq>=' + (LIQUIDITY_THRESHOLD*100) + '% Qual>=' + QUALITY_THRESHOLD);

item.name: Adaptive Epoch Evaluator
item.description: FIX1: Main request is GET to port 8083 (always reachable). Pre-request builds PAM contracts and calls ACTUS /eventsBatch via pm.sendRequest(). Test script reads actus_epoch_data, runs 11 behavioral models, computes adaptive cadence, loops via postman.setNextRequest() until SIM_END_HOURS or MAX_EPOCHS.

exec: // FIX A: Build PAM contracts and call ACTUS via pm.sendRequest()
// Main request targets port 8083 so it never blocks on risksrv3
var pad = function(n){ return n < 10 ? '0'+n : String(n); };
console.log('NEW T-BILL: $' + amt + ' purchased epoch ' + epochNum);
// ── FIX A: Direct pm.sendRequest() to ACTUS ──
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({contracts: contracts, riskFactors: []}) }
// TEST: Read actus_epoch_data, run 11 behavioral models,
// compute adaptive cadence, loop or terminate.
// Fallback: ACTUS empty — use portfolio face values
console.warn('ACTUS returned empty — using portfolio face values (epoch ' + epochNum + ')');
if (cashRes && drain>0) cashRes.face = Math.max(100, cashRes.face - Math.min(cashRes.face*0.9, drain));
postman.setNextRequest('═══ FINAL SUMMARY: Adaptive Timeline Dashboard ═══');
postman.setNextRequest('═══ FINAL SUMMARY: Adaptive Timeline Dashboard ═══');
console.log('║  APPROACH 3 iter5-fix1 — FULL TIMELINE SUMMARY                                   ║');
console.log('║  FIX A: pm.sendRequest()  FIX B: all main reqs → port 8083                      ║');
console.log('║ Epoch │ Hour │ Cadence  │Back%  │Liq%   │Qual  │EW Posture  │MintGt │ Mint     ║');
console.log('║  CADENCE: NORMAL='+cc.NORMAL+'ep  WATCH='+cc.WATCH+'ep  ELEVATED='+cc.ELEVATED+'ep  CRITICAL='+cc.CRITICAL+'ep                         ║');
pm.test('Full cycle: '+history.length+' epochs completed', function(){ pm.expect(history.length).to.be.above(0); });
